about.title: Fashion That Honors Who You Are
about.p1: Tichel & Co. was born from a simple belief: that head coverings should be as beautiful as the women who wear them. We saw a gap in the market — observant women who wanted luxury fashion that respected their values, not compromised on them.
about.p2: Every piece in our collection is designed in Israel and crafted from the finest fabrics — silk, cashmere, velvet, and linen. We work with artisan manufacturers who share our commitment to quality and attention to detail.
about.p3: Our mission goes beyond fashion. We believe that covering your head is an act of strength and beauty. Our designs celebrate that choice with elegance, sophistication, and joy.
about.value1Text: Every piece is crafted from premium fabrics with meticulous attention to detail. We never compromise on quality.
about.value2Text: We design for women who cover with intention. Every item celebrates modesty as a source of beauty and strength.
about.value3Text: We work with ethical manufacturers and use sustainable materials wherever possible. Fashion should respect the earth too.

careGuide.title: Care Guide
careGuide.subtitle: How to care for your Tichel & Co. pieces to ensure they stay beautiful for years.
careGuide.silkText: Hand wash in cool water with mild detergent. Do not wring. Lay flat to dry away from direct sunlight. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth.
careGuide.velvetText: Dry clean recommended. To refresh between cleanings, steam gently on the reverse side. Store hanging or rolled, never folded.
careGuide.cashmereText: Hand wash in lukewarm water with cashmere-specific detergent. Gently squeeze — never twist. Reshape and lay flat to dry on a towel.
careGuide.linenText: Machine wash on delicate cycle in cool water. Tumble dry on low or hang to dry. Iron while slightly damp for a crisp finish.
careGuide.cottonText: Machine wash warm on gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Iron on medium heat. Our cotton pieces are pre-shrunk for consistent fit.
careGuide.generalText: Store your head coverings in a cool, dry place. Use a fabric bag for delicate items. Avoid contact with perfume and hairspray.

custom.title: Custom Design Request
custom.subtitle: Describe your dream head covering and we'll bring it to life. Our artisans work with you to create a piece that's uniquely yours.
custom.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us about the style, occasion, colors, and any special details you'd like...
custom.successText: Thank you for your custom design request. Our team will review it and get back to you within 2-3 business days.
